name: TSC® Visa® Card

verdict.text: The 5% rate at Tractor Supply and Petsense is strong for regular farm/ranch/pet-supply shoppers, and the extra 3% on gas, groceries, and vet services is a genuinely useful bonus category most store cards don't offer — but rewards only redeem at Tractor Supply/Petsense, so it's still a specialty card, not a general-purpose one.

earn_rates.category: Gas stations, grocery stores & veterinary services

earn_note: This is the open-loop Visa version of Tractor Supply's card — it earns outside Tractor Supply/Petsense, unlike the closed-loop, store-only TSC Store Card, which earns the same 5% at Tractor Supply/Petsense but nothing elsewhere. Cardholders are automatically enrolled as Preferred Plus Neighbors, the highest tier of Tractor Supply's separate Neighbor's Club loyalty program. Special financing offers (e.g., a 3.99% promotional rate on purchases of $1,599+) periodically run at TractorSupply.com/TSCCard on purchases of $199 and up.

redemption_options.method: Redeemable at Tractor Supply stores, TractorSupply.com, or in the TSC App

points.per_100k: $1,000 in Tractor Supply / Petsense rewards — no other redemption exists
points.note: A closed-loop currency despite the open-loop Visa network — rewards come back as Tractor Supply/Petsense credit, not cash or a statement credit.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners — Neighbor's Club Rewards redeem only at Tractor Supply and Petsense.

insurance.detail: Not confirmed on Citi's or Tractor Supply's public product pages for this card
Not confirmed on Citi's or Tractor Supply's public product pages for this card

protection_note: A standard (not Signature) Visa tier with no confirmed purchase protection, extended warranty, or travel insurance. Treat this as a rewards-and-financing card with no meaningful insurance suite.
rental_note: No rental car coverage found for this card.

status_perks.name: Preferred Plus Neighbor status
status_perks.note: Cardholders are automatically placed in Neighbor's Club's highest membership tier, unlocking extra in-store perks and offers beyond the card's own rewards.

services.name: Special financing offers
services.detail: Limited-time and everyday promotional financing (e.g., 3.99% on purchases of $1,599+ until paid in full) on qualifying purchases of $199 or more.

services.name: Foreign transaction fee
services.detail: 3% of each purchase transaction in U.S. dollars, per Tractor Supply's cardholder terms.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns rewards on their spend (into your account)
No dedicated insurance to share — this card doesn't carry a confirmed protection suite

additional_cards.note: Free to add, useful mainly for pooling a household's farm/ranch, pet-supply, and gas/grocery spend toward the bonus categories.

timeline.text: Tractor Supply/Citi issue two distinct card products: the closed-loop, store-only TSC Store Card (5% at Tractor Supply/Petsense, unusable elsewhere) and this open-loop TSC Visa Card (same 5%, plus 3% gas/grocery/vet and 1% elsewhere). Confirm which one you're comparing — they are not the same card.
